overview.description: The Innovator Premium Income 20 Barrier ETF - January (JANH) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in income alternatives. The fund seeks to provide a consistent income stream and a limited protective barrier against losses over a one-year period. The actively managed fund holds a package of S&P 500 FLEX options and US Treasurys. JANH was launched on Dec 31, 2023 and is issued by Innovator.
